title: bulbophyllum dichotomum
intro: Bulbophyllum dichotomum, also known as the 'Split Fork Orchid', is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum dichotomum typically involve boiling or infusing the roots and leaves in water to create a medicinal tea.
